name: git_diff_analyze
description: Parse a unified git diff and return structured metadata: inferred intent, category, surface area by layer, risk signals (migrations, auth, concurrency, deleted tests, etc.), and suggested reviewers. Use before a code review or when summarizing multiple PRs.

diff.description: Unified diff text. Accepts multi-file diffs from `git diff`, `gh pr diff`, or a patch file.

repo_language_hint.description: Language hint to tune risk detection. Default: auto.

max_files.description: Safety cap on number of files analyzed. Diffs beyond this are truncated largest-hunks-first. Default: 200.
